apify.name: Apify
apify.description: Web scraping and automation platform with 3000+ ready-made actors for data extraction, browser automation, and crawling

atlassian.name: Atlassian (Confluence + Jira)
atlassian.description: Confluence wiki and Jira project management — search, create, and update pages and issues

chrome-devtools.name: Chrome DevTools
chrome-devtools.description: Control and inspect a live Chrome browser for automation, debugging, and performance analysis via the Chrome DevTools Protocol

github.name: GitHub
github.description: GitHub repository management — repos, issues, PRs, code search, and more via the official GitHub MCP server

google-maps.name: Google Maps
google-maps.description: Google Maps integration for places search, geocoding, directions, and distance matrix via the official MCP server

hetzner.name: Hetzner Cloud
hetzner.description: Manage Hetzner Cloud infrastructure — servers, networks, load balancers, volumes, firewalls, and more via the Hetzner Cloud API

hostinger.name: Hostinger
hostinger.description: Web hosting management via Hostinger API — manage domains, hosting plans, email accounts, and website settings

linear.name: Linear
linear.description: Linear project management — create, update, and search issues, projects, and teams via the Linear API

miro.name: Miro
miro.description: Collaborative whiteboard — create and manipulate Miro boards, sticky notes, cards, connectors, and shapes via the Miro API

notion.name: Notion
notion.description: Notion workspace integration — read, create, and update pages, databases, blocks, and comments via the official Notion MCP server

stripe.name: Stripe
stripe.description: Stripe payments and billing — manage customers, subscriptions, payment intents, invoices, and more via the official Stripe MCP server

tavily.name: Tavily
tavily.description: AI-optimized web search — retrieve accurate, real-time search results and extract content from URLs tailored for AI agents

todoist.name: Todoist
todoist.description: Task management with natural language — create, update, complete, and search tasks and projects in Todoist

wise.name: Wise
wise.description: International money transfers and multi-currency account management via the Wise (TransferWise) API
